key_evidence: Turkish appeals court annulled the CHP party congress on May 21, removing the entire main opposition party leadership through judicial action
Borsa Istanbul circuit breaker triggered after 6% drop — capital markets pricing the event as a structural governance shock
Human Rights Watch issued a named condemnation May 22 explicitly framing the action as an attack on multi-party democracy
Turkish police detained 13 people on May 23 in a downstream criminal probe of the opposition congress that chose the ousted leader
Pattern arc: Imamoglu imprisonment → X account blocks → judicial removal of entire CHP leadership. Now structural, not episodic
methodology_novel: JUDICIAL-REMOVAL-OF-OPPOSITION-PARTY-LEADERSHIP — first benchmark case of a court annulling an opposition party's governing congress and dissolving its leadership. Established as distinct weighting convention (-4 to -6 composite delta when judicial action is institutionally final, government does not restore status quo, and downstream criminal enforcement follows). All three conditions met for Turkey 2026-05-23.
